title: Strange Verilator behavior with power, signdness and more

features.name: power operator with signed operands and negative exponent
features.description: Code should include a power operator (**) with signed localparam operands where the exponent is negative

features.name: ternary operator selecting between computed signed values
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator selecting between power-computed values and zero based on an input

features.name: concatenation of four byte vectors to form 32-bit word
features.description: Code should include concatenation of four 8-bit vectors to form a 32-bit word
